name: Poppy Seed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the Solo poppy seed filling, then egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in vanilla extract and sour cream until combined.
4. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with the stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Pour the batter into a greased tube or bundt pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Drizzle with a glaze made by mixing powdered sugar and milk.
